X.GetQuestForLevel(R)local y,G=nil,(-1212736-(-265600))-(-947136)for X,g in pairs(X[AN[cN("I\030\162\014\253\015\029\019\227",6292127822144-733504)]])do if R>=X and X>G then G=X y=g end end return y end;(getgenv())[AN[cN("I$\240\223\001\213\230\004\158",900736+12937514336640)]]=X local R=game:GetService(AN[cN("\140\019\v\243-\250\254\012\230%\239!\152C\239\006\254",-466752+29923037617984)])local y=game:GetService(AN[cN("G\n\245\024\236O\129",-625920+13664439078144)])local G=game:GetService(AN[cN("O\024+\233\b\253\155\002\001",(494784-106880)+32141387371712)])local g=game:GetService(AN[cN("L\201\006\000\t\229\167\205\132\243\243?",531776+((-1278080-((-843456+470656)+51456))+4568771886080))])local h=game:GetService(AN[cN("Lu\169\002\001\236\196\201\250r\r",34474628745216-2048)])local e=game:GetService(AN[cN("J#\231\017\a\r\004\223\249\170",-278016+28481002159616)])local x=game:GetService(AN[cN("\183,\000\223\227\180\141\004\242\031\130",1844689209600-755968)])local o=AN[cN("N\019\021\b\169\184-\237",(398208+559419536384)-444288)]local J=AN[cN("K\018\244u\245\255\184\140\1878\190\220\187",484928+((454016+31104151694464)-(-524224)))]local d=o..(AN[cN("\223",-647232+35108137066560)]..J)if makefolder and not isfolder(o)then makefolder(o)end _G[AN[cN("N\181\029\b\223\014\015/\127\029\015\140",735512564864-(-584576))]]={}local function E()if writefile then local X,R=pcall(function()return x:JSONEncode(_G[AN[cN("N\025\252\136\223\014\254\003\223\029\182\001",452480+28188943652992)]])end)if X then writefile(d,R)end end end local function B()if isfile and isfile(d)then local X=readfile(d)local R,y=pcall(function()return x:JSONDecode(X)end)if R and type(y)==AN[cN("f\222q\n\249",(20519207940352-858752)-824960)]then _G[AN[cN("\014\025\253\189\179\014\021\232\223\027\135\237",-69632+12469363871744)]]=y end end end local function O(X,R)if _G[AN[cN("\213\153\253\a\031\014\v\028\223\239s\237",25736517635328-(-144128))]][X]~=nil then return _G[AN[cN("N\012}\b/\014\021\132\223\0158\237",(-384640+31693637545408)-(-258240))]][X]end return R end B()local b=y[AN[cN("=\149\244\254\v\228\028\179\018T\r",30738007439936-(589376+(-537088+192000)))]]repeat task[AN[cN("iS\b\v",30464202423040-(-752896+(875136+-729728)))]]()until e={[AN[cN("?>\029\005\246\005_",1352913839232-(-859008))]]=Vector3[AN[cN("f\247\253",(526976+20814485661504)-930240)]]((-751095-(-293184))-(-445440),((-74304+-309706)-84992)-(-396416+(507200+-580160)),97921-105472);[AN[cN("@\254k\014\239",773632+(788096+33573757791104))]]=Vector3[AN[cN("\237\a\018",562432+7039450835712)]](154459-148800,-715211-(-716224),(-221760+1024320)+(-1021717-(-218816))),[AN[cN(".\252\018\001\247\234\187/\031\1782\150\251a3\018|",(957184+-476864)+26798447963072)]]=Vector3[AN[cN("Ww\018",((457088+-1173888)-(-732416-(-108672)))+27390080281472)]](-396736+(1275292-883648),-634048+634363,-974272+971142);[AN[cN("=\157\227\242\019\245\244\185\1854!\2036\248\249",83072+11466488855424)]]=Vector3[AN[cN("\022\247\018",9926742359552-(-803328))]](-305216+293215,(40576+(333184-774656))+401228,99776+(242979-351616));[AN[cN("+\203\252\020\255\2171\015\204$0\025\233\239\019\164",(33131377423424-26176)-(-324096))]]=Vector3[AN[cN("\224\247\018",341312+31920196602560)]](582023-576704,106135-106112,-234880+((328192+-169472)+76067))}elseif local function n()local X,R=pcall(function()return local function V(X,R)local y=game:GetService(AN[cN("=\175\t\002\254\000k\221\183B\005\255\217\019\131\147 \226\r",218304+4628900784960)])local Zw()b[AN[cN("\146\005\249\014\239\002\017=-\207\030\018\129\255",33112049667968-(-700544))]]:Connect(function()task[AN[cN("o\234\251.",(1042048+-353472)+30132416118336)]](220480.5-220480)Zw()end);(getgenv())[AN[cN("K\160\249\248\014\186\015\255\255\"",8596377036288-(-6656))]]={};(getgenv())[AN[cN("K\1851\236\026\020\245",(2369746771392-((-715456-667712)-(-899776)))-(-950784))]]={AN[cN("\217",502400+21931176252800)];AN[cN("\148",20701741865344-(-18944+-482432))],AN[cN("\251",13784697360128-(-176384))]};(getgenv())[AN[cN("K\215\249\229!\219\197\024\250",2007897003648-(-207232))]]={[AN[cN("\178",718528+(554880+28871842632128))]]=138752+-138751.5,[AN[cN("\030",(27953794995584-998592)-(-884736+235712))]]=671872.5-671872;[AN[cN("\251",33498596746368-(-678784))]]=(1325760-674816)+(16832.5-667776),[AN[cN("N",(-1079488-(-615360))+4349728593152)]]=227328.5-227328,[AN[cN(">",-906112+18614389166976)]]=-470847.5-(-470848)}local function cw(X)local R,y=pcall(function()return Enum[AN[cN("=:\020\202T\245\001",781312+17365625738240)]][X]end)return R and y or nil end local function Aw()local X=b[AN[cN("-\161\249\017\143\002\017\131\209",25853555349568-(-288704))]]local R=X and X:FindFirstChildOfClass(AN[cN("@-\2251\r\202\n\251",2645699375424-(-478912))])if not X or not R then return false end if R[AN[cN("\192\029\245U(\244",33666100863552-(-286144))]]<=99712+-99712 then return false end if R:GetState()==Enum[AN[cN("@-\2374\205\001\249\194\251!\237\015\241\239\003\183\159",28771986554624-638720)]][AN[cN("<\179\220\003",(-60928+20211042698752)-(884032+((-881856-(-582144))+-299648)))]]then return false end local y=X:FindFirstChild(AN[cN("%\221\251\004\180\019\241",7578469774016-(-19776))])if y and y:FindFirstChild(AN[cN("S\001\001\208",9563817855616-(-570752))])then return false end return true end local function tw(X)local R=b[AN[cN(":\151\249\017\239\002\137\241\r",18558552720640-(-965376))]]if not R then return nil end for R,y in ipairs(R:GetChildren())do if y:IsA(AN[cN("L\tM\189",-748224+31570157857472)])then if X==nil then return y end if y[AN[cN("\244\027\255\208\232\021\a",-365696+22617298146432)]]==X then return y end end end return nil end local function Mw(X)local R={b[AN[cN("\140o\002\b\000\169\002\b",19201725741952-703360)]];b[AN[cN("a%\249\210\239\002\017\181\232",4736+28305981959552)]]}for R,y in ipairs(R)do if y then for R,y in ipairs(y:GetChildren())do if y:IsA(AN[cN("L\026NM",177216+16432544697280)])and y[AN[cN("\156\155\000\253\208\021\a",22486301840576-(1007616+-445248))]]==X then return y end end end end return nil end local function Qw(X)if tw(X)then return true end local R=Mw(X)if not R then return false end EquipWeapon(R[AN[cN("\211\213\012\248",(-49664+25181392464256)-(492160+(-948224-385792)))]])local y=tick()repeat task[AN[cN("h\223\232\v",601152+34915936031680)]](.05)until tw(X)or tick()-y>.3 return tw(X)~=nil end function Skill(X)if not Aw()then return end local R=cw(X)if not R then return end local y=game:GetService(AN[cN("~\019\t\164\001\234\147\221%\002\000\147\217\020\163C\139\213\r",477056+10164039628928)])y:SendKeyEvent(true,R,false,game)task[AN[cN("o\234\235\159",((-603840+20469814232832)-(-653056))-149312)]](.08)y:SendKeyEvent(false,R,false,game)end local function RN()local
